text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Ruby. I'd like to give you a gift.
Is there anything you want?

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Oh, no... Your well-wishes are more than enough.
I sincerely appreciate them.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text: Really? It's your birthday though. I'd like to get something.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text: Oh, how about a hair accessory?

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
The other day I saw some things finely crafted out
of glass. I thought something like that would suit
you...

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but you probably already have so many
accessories that are better quality. Sorry, I'll think
of—

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text: I mean, I wouldn't refuse... a hair accessory.

text_block_list.name: K.S.Miracle
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? Great. I'll pick out something special for
you then.

text_block_list.name: Daiichi Ruby
text_block_list.text:
Thank you... Though, don't go to too much
trouble.
